<think>I found the information I was looking for. In the consolidated balance sheet (合并资产负债表) of 浙江夏厦精密制造股份有限公司 (Zhejiang Xiaxia Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd.), I can see:

- 期末余额 (ending balance): 913,610.87 yuan
- 期初余额 (beginning balance): 743,805.85 yuan

The question asks for "其他应付款" (other payables) of 夏厦精密 (Xiaxia Precision). This document is from 浙江夏厦精密制造股份有限公司, which matches the company name.

I have found the evidence needed to answer the question. I should stop and provide the answer with the verbatim text from the document.</think>
